mechanism: Wider HY-IG credit spreads signal rising default risk and tightening financial conditions — historically bearish for equities. Spread compression indicates risk appetite recovery and is bullish for SPY. The spread leads equity drawdowns because credit markets price in distress before equity mark-to-market catches up.
key_finding: tbd — pending Evan tournament in Wave 10G.4C
caveats: FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2 series observation_start was 2023-04-24 as of 2026-04-22; pre-2023 OAS history sourced from hy_ig_spy_v1 parquet (v1+FRED splice). Data quality verified against v2 parquet.
OAS data starts 1997 on FRED; effective pair start date is 2000-01-03 (limited by SPY availability).
GFC 2008-2009 dominates the tails; regime models should be stress-tested for out-of-sample stability.
COVID March 2020 was an extreme but transient spread widening — check tournament sensitivity to inclusion/exclusion.

Derived columns ccc_bb_spread_pct, yield_spread_10y3m_pct, yield_spread_10y2y_pct, bbb_ig_spread_pct are renamed from v1/v2 bare names per DATA-D12 suffix convention. Downstream consumers (Evan) must use new column names.

known_stress_episodes.label: Dot-com bust
known_stress_episodes.note: HY-IG spread widened from ~3% to ~8% as credit conditions deteriorated with equity bear market.

known_stress_episodes.label: Global Financial Crisis
known_stress_episodes.note: Peak HY-IG spread ~15% in late 2008. Dominant tail event for the sample.

known_stress_episodes.label: European Sovereign Debt Crisis
known_stress_episodes.note: Moderate spread widening; smaller amplitude than GFC but meaningful regime shift.

known_stress_episodes.label: COVID-19 shock
known_stress_episodes.note: Rapid spike to ~10% spread followed by equally rapid Fed-driven compression — extreme but transient.

known_stress_episodes.label: Rate-hike cycle 2022
known_stress_episodes.note: Gradual spread widening alongside equity re-rating; less acute than GFC/COVID.

data_provenance.splice_note: FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2/BAMLC0A0CM truncated to 2023-04-24 onward as of fetch date; pre-2023 history back-filled from hy_ig_spy_v1 parquet (Wave 10G.1 archive). Splice method: combine_first (live FRED overrides on overlap).
